title: AI Agents Go Mainstream in iGaming with 79% Executive Adoption
summary: 79% of senior executives report using AI Agents, with 66% seeing productivity gains. iGaming shifts from pilots in support, payments/KYC to production systems in 2026.

title: AR/VR Rebound 87% in 2026 for Immersive iGaming Experiences
summary: IDC forecasts 87% rebound in AR/VR headset shipments in 2026 after 12% 2025 decline. iGaming uses for virtual casinos, 3D social environments, AR betting overlays.

title: iGaming Affiliates Shift to Hybrid Value-Based Models in 2026
summary: Affiliate models evolve from revenue share to hybrid agreements focusing on customer LTV, hyper-personalization, bonuses tied to responsible gaming scores.

title: Data-Driven Loyalty Programs Boost Retention via AI Analytics
summary: Operators use AI/ML to personalize rewards based on behavior, preferences; optimizes lifetime value, fosters responsible play as key 2026 competitive edge.

title: AI-Driven User Journeys as New Currency for iGaming Success
summary: Real-time AI personalization of games, offers, wellness interventions enhances retention and LTV; differentiates operators in competitive 2026 market.

title: SOFTSWISS 2026 iGaming Trends Report from 350+ Experts
summary: Report based on 350+ surveys, 120K media headlines, 30 SOFTSWISS interviews; outlines key trends shaping iGaming future for operators.

title: Real-Time Personalization in iGaming Becomes Regulator-Ready
summary: Evolves to real-time decisioning adapting to behavior/risk/consent; systems explain offers for 2026 compliance and transparency.
